## Code review guidance

When reviewing pull requests, prioritize correctness, security, and test coverage.

Treat code-comment wording and style as **low priority**. Only raise a comment-related point when the comment violates the project's comment policy in `CONTRIBUTING.md` (for example: PR-point-in-time narration, or a comment that merely restates the code). Do not nitpick phrasing of otherwise-correct comments.

Never repeat the same observation across multiple locations — make the point once, on the clearest instance, and move on. A finding that recurs at N sites is one review comment, not N.
